ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "geoid" INTEGER /* Geographic identifier for the county */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "initiated" INTEGER /* Number of people who initiated vaccination */,
  "initiated_rate" REAL /* Rate of people who initiated vaccination */,
  "complete" INTEGER /* Number of people who completed vaccination */,
  "complete_rate" REAL /* Rate of people who completed vaccination */,
  "last7" INTEGER /* Number of new vaccinations in the last 7 days */,
  "last7_rate" REAL /* Rate of new vaccinations in the last 7 days */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the vaccinated individuals */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the vaccinated individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the vaccinated individuals */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system from which the data is collected */,
  "data_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_date", "geoid")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "geoid" INTEGER /* Geographic identifier for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geoid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the distribution record */,
  "geoid" INTEGER /* Geographic identifier for the county */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the distribution report */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine distributed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vaccines distributed */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system from which the data is collected */,
  "data_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_distribution_geoid FOREIGN KEY ("geoid") REFERENCES counties ("geoid")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_supply" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supply record */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the vaccine_suppliers table */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the supply report */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine supplied */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vaccines supplied */,
  "data_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccine_supply_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES vaccine_suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
